bill_title: Tax Relief for American Families and Workers Act of 2024
description: Expanded child tax credit, restored R&D expensing, extended business interest deductions, increased LIHTC

Finance & Insurance.reason: Restores business interest deduction and R&D amortization rules favorable to financial firms

Real Estate & Housing.reason: Increases Low-Income Housing Tax Credit allocation by 12.5%

Tech & Telecom.reason: Restores immediate R&D expensing instead of 5-year amortization

Construction & Engineering.reason: Extends 100% bonus depreciation for capital equipment

Healthcare & Pharma.reason: R&D expensing restoration benefits pharma/biotech development costs

Labor.reason: Child Tax Credit expansion is a core labor/worker benefit priority

Defense & Aerospace.reason: Bonus depreciation and R&D credits benefit large defense manufacturers

bill_title: Family and Small Business Taxpayer Protection Act
description: Rescinded $80B in new IRS enforcement funding from the Inflation Reduction Act

Finance & Insurance.reason: Reduced IRS audit capacity for high-income taxpayers and pass-through businesses

Real Estate & Housing.reason: Real estate pass-throughs heavily targeted under IRS enforcement expansion

Labor.reason: Unions opposed gutting enforcement against wealthy tax avoidance

Ideological.reason: Signature anti-IRS, anti-government-expansion vote for conservative PACs

Healthcare & Pharma.reason: Reduced audit risk for complex pharmaceutical corporate structures

Professional Services.reason: Tax advisory clients benefit from reduced IRS enforcement

description: Debt ceiling deal: suspended debt limit, clawed back COVID funds, cut IRS funding, added SNAP work requirements

Finance & Insurance.reason: Averted catastrophic default; markets required resolution

Labor.reason: SNAP work requirements and IRS cuts opposed by unions as anti-worker

Ideological.reason: Spending restraint, work requirements, and IRS rescission

Energy & Utilities.reason: Accelerated permitting provisions aided energy project approvals

Defense & Aerospace.reason: Avoided default-triggered spending sequester on defense

description: Unlocked reconciliation for extending TCJA tax cuts plus deep cuts to Medicaid, SNAP, and clean energy credits

Finance & Insurance.reason: Permanently lower corporate rates and restored TCJA provisions

Healthcare & Pharma.reason: Medicaid cuts threaten hospital and pharma revenue streams

Labor.reason: Cuts to SNAP/Medicaid viewed as attacking the worker safety net

Ideological.reason: Core conservative fiscal agenda: tax cuts funded by spending reductions

Defense & Aerospace.reason: Budget resolution included significant defense spending increases

Real Estate & Housing.reason: TCJA extensions preserve pass-through deductions for real estate

bill_title: Expressing Sense of Congress That a Carbon Tax Would Be Detrimental
description: Non-binding resolution against carbon pricing mechanisms

Energy & Utilities.reason: Carbon tax is the existential threat to fossil fuel sector business model

Transportation.reason: Fuel costs would rise substantially under carbon pricing

Labor.reason: Building trades and mining unions concerned about fossil fuel job losses

Ideological.reason: Anti-carbon-tax is a core conservative economic position

bill_title: IRS Crypto Broker Reporting Rule Disapproval
description: Overturned IRS rule requiring digital asset brokers to report crypto transaction proceeds

Finance & Insurance.reason: DeFi/crypto industry lobbied intensely against reporting burden

Tech & Telecom.reason: Technology sector broadly supports lighter regulatory touch on digital assets

Labor.reason: Viewed as creating tax evasion safe harbor benefiting wealthy crypto holders

description: Tax relief for wildfire and East Palestine train derailment victims

Labor.reason: Worker and community disaster relief; union households in affected areas benefited

Finance & Insurance.reason: Supports disaster relief payments flowing through insurance channels

Ideological.reason: Bipartisan disaster relief broadly supported across ideological spectrum

bill_title: Department of Defense Appropriations Act, FY2024
description: Set $858B for national defense including major procurement and R&D accounts

Defense & Aerospace.reason: Core appropriations for Lockheed, Raytheon, Boeing, Northrop — the single biggest sector spending event

Labor.reason: Defense manufacturing employment and worker benefits protected

Energy & Utilities.reason: Defense installations are major energy consumers; contracts embedded in DoD spending

bill_title: Department of Defense Appropriations Act, FY2025
description: House FY2025 defense appropriations at ~$895B authorization

Defense & Aerospace.reason: Direct sector spending at the highest level ever appropriated

Labor.reason: Secures jobs at defense primes and suppliers across the country

description: Authorized $895B in defense spending, servicemember pay raises, and procurement authorities

Defense & Aerospace.reason: Authorization of all major weapons programs: F-35, B-21, Columbia-class, hypersonics

Labor.reason: Servicemember pay raises and defense manufacturing employment protected

Energy & Utilities.reason: DoD energy security provisions and military base energy requirements

bill_title: CRA Disapproval of CFPB Small Business Lending Rule
description: Overturned CFPB rule requiring small business lenders to collect and report demographic loan data

Finance & Insurance.reason: Banks and lenders avoided costly compliance burden and data disclosure

Real Estate & Housing.reason: Small commercial real estate lenders relieved of reporting burden

Labor.reason: Section 1071 data seen as tool to expose discriminatory lending against minority businesses

Professional Services.reason: Reduced compliance costs for financial services clients

description: $26B Israel security assistance package as part of broader foreign supplemental

Defense & Aerospace.reason: Direct procurement contracts for Raytheon (Iron Dome), Lockheed (F-35 parts), Boeing

description: First-ever full-year CR locking in FY2024 spending levels for all domestic programs

Defense & Aerospace.reason: Defense spending maintained at baseline; avoided sequester

Labor.reason: Flat-funded labor enforcement agencies during inflation — a real-terms cut

Healthcare & Pharma.reason: NIH, CDC flat-funded; hospitals opposed continued uncertainty

Ideological.reason: Spending restraint; GOP unified behind CR approach

bill_title: United States-Taiwan Expedited Double-Tax Relief Act
description: Special tax rules for Taiwanese residents with U.S.-source income; bilateral tax coordination

Tech & Telecom.reason: Semiconductor and tech supply chain companies with Taiwan operations benefit from reduced double-taxation

Defense & Aerospace.reason: Taiwan defense industrial base access incentivized

Finance & Insurance.reason: Cross-border investment and financial service flows clarified

bill_title: Stop Terror-Financing and Tax Penalties on American Hostages Act
description: Allowed Treasury to revoke tax-exempt status of organizations supporting terrorism; tax penalty relief for hostages

Ideological.reason: Pro-Israel PACs strongly supported revocation authority targeting terror-linked nonprofits

Finance & Insurance.reason: Tax compliance clarity for nonprofit sector donors
